scripts.check-config:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('wrangler.toml')){console.error('ERROR: wrangler.toml not found. Copy wrangler.toml.example and fill in your Cloudflare IDs.
See README.md Step 4.');process.exit(1)}const t=fs.readFileSync('wrangler.toml','utf8');if(/__D1_DATABASE_ID__|__KV_NAMESPACE_ID__|REPLACE_AFTER_CREATE/.test(t)){console.error('ERROR: Unresolved placeholders in wrangler.toml.
Replace __D1_DATABASE_ID__ and __KV_NAMESPACE_ID__ with real IDs.
See README.md Step 4.');process.exit(1)}"
